notes: Ollama Cloud models invoked via the `ollama launch claude` shim.
Uses Claude Code CLI in headless mode (-p with --output-format stream-json).
isolate_home defaults to false so Claude subscription auth (read from ~/.claude/) works.

variants.label: Kimi K2.6 (Ollama Cloud) via Claude Code
variants.selection_reason: Best Kimi model on Ollama Cloud. State-of-the-art coding + long-horizon execution + multimodal agent swarm.

variants.label: Qwen 3.5 (Ollama Cloud) via Claude Code
variants.selection_reason: Best Qwen model on Ollama Cloud. Reasoning, coding, and agentic tool use with vision.

variants.label: GLM 5.1 (Ollama Cloud) via Claude Code
variants.selection_reason: Best GLM model on Ollama Cloud. Long-horizon agentic engineering with autonomous execution and sustained iteration.

variants.label: MiniMax M2.7 (Ollama Cloud) via Claude Code
variants.selection_reason: Best MiniMax model on Ollama Cloud. Mid-tier model testing Python-stack knowledge and LangChain wiring capability.

variants.label: DeepSeek V4 Pro (Ollama Cloud) via Claude Code
variants.selection_reason: Best DeepSeek model on Ollama Cloud. Tests whether Ollama Cloud serving avoids the reasoning_content multi-turn bug seen via OpenRouter/opencode.
